subject: Art and Design
coverageNote: Form directories exist only where teaching-module source PDFs were ingested. Missing forms must resolve as known-gap, not empty objects.

lesson.title: Provide clues or hints about artists’ unique styles to help learners make connections.
topics: Expected Standard: Careers in Art classified appropriately
activities: Printed images of various forms of Visual Arts
assessment: Learners should be tasked to mention / write what is involved in a number of listed art related
careers. For example, an art curator: is a professional responsible for overseeing and
managing artefacts or other items of historical or cultural significance.
Defined art (Performing, Literary and Fine Arts)
Categorized branches of Art (Visual Arts, Performing Arts, Digital Arts…)
